title: WAF Multi-Attack Vector Scoring (Combined Methods)
description: Calculates a threat score per source IP based on the diversity of attack types (SQL injection, XSS, path traversal, command injection, SSRF). An IP triggering multiple different CRS rule categories indicates a sophisticated attacker using multiple techniques. Uses combined scoring (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Combined Methods).
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and 'Action' = 'BLOCK' | stats count as total_blocks, distinctcount('Rule Key') as unique_rules, distinctcount('Rule Type') as attack_types, distinctcount('Request URL') as unique_urls by 'Client IP' | eval threat_score = total_blocks + (unique_rules * 5) + (attack_types * 10) | sort -threat_score | where unique_rules > 2
falsepositives: Authorized penetration testers running full OWASP scans
